name: Elementary
description: Modern restaurant website with menu showcase and online reservations.

phases.name: Intake & Goals
phases.description: Collect requirements, success metrics, constraints from the client.

phases.name: PRD & Research (47-step system)
phases.description: Run our structured PRD workflow: competitive/SEO scan, booking patterns, risk/edge cases.

phases.name: Experience Blueprint
phases.description: Plan flows, states, and content; define color/typography directions.

phases.name: Wireframes & UI Directions
phases.description: Wireframe key screens against 2–3 color schemes; agree on the chosen direction.

phases.name: Build & Integrations
phases.description: Implement booking flow, CMS menus, Stripe/Twilio hooks, performance budget.

phases.name: QA & UAT
phases.description: Cross-device testing, accessibility, schema/SEO checks, load/perf validation.

phases.name: Client Feedback Loops
phases.description: Iterate with the client (2–3 cycles) until sign-off.

phases.name: Launch & Handoff
phases.description: Deploy, run smoke tests, and hand over training + Looms.

faq.question: How do you price?
faq.answer: Fixed band with agreed scope; typical restaurant builds land between £2.5k–£6k.

faq.question: Can you integrate our POS?
faq.answer: Yes. Toast/Square hooks are supported; others via webhooks.

faq.question: How fast can you launch?
faq.answer: 11–14 days for a standard booking site with menu CMS.

faq.question: Do you support multiple locations?
faq.answer: Yes, with per-location availability flags and menu variants.

faq.question: Can staff edit the menu without developers?
faq.answer: Yes. Menu items, pricing, and availability are editable in a simple CMS with scheduled publishing.

faq.question: What happens if a guest cancels or no-shows?
faq.answer: We can require deposits or card holds via Stripe and send automated reminder/cancellation flows to cut no-shows.

faq.question: Is the site accessible?
faq.answer: We build to WCAG 2.1 AA patterns: focus states, semantic HTML, ARIA for menus/modals, and high-contrast fallbacks.

faq.question: Can we pipe bookings into our CRM or email tool?
faq.answer: Yes. We support webhooks and native integrations (HubSpot, Klaviyo) so bookings sync with your CRM and campaigns.

faq.question: Do you provide training?
faq.answer: We include a 45-minute handoff with loom videos plus a quickstart doc for staff to manage bookings and menu updates.
